name: createFacebookAdCreative
description: Creates a Facebook ad creative with image and caption. IMPORTANT Workflow: Ask user to provide an image. Once image is provided, generate a compelling caption based on the image and business context. Present the generated caption to the user for approval. Only proceed with creative creation after user confirms the caption. After creative is created, proceed with ad creation using this creative.Find image URL from previous conversation context (user-uploaded S3 URL). Ask user for destination URL (website, product page, WhatsApp link, etc). Only create creative after user confirms caption and destination URL is valid.

ad_account_id.description: The ID of the ad account. MUST be obtained first through listAccounts command before attempting creative creation.

name.description: The name of the ad creative

page_id.description: The Facebook Page ID for the ad creative

message.description: Message to be displayed with the link. Must be generated based on the image and confirmed by user.

link.description: Destination URL for the ad. MUST ask user for this. Examples: business website, product page, WhatsApp link (wa.me). Do not use example.com.

caption.description: Caption for the link. Must be generated based on the image and confirmed by user.

picture.description: URL of the image for the ad. MUST use the S3 URL that user uploaded earlier in the conversation. This URL starts with the S3 bucket endpoint.

call_to_action_type.description: Type of the call to action
